heading: Purposes
label: 3701 Purposes
notes: Amendments2022—, struck out subsec. (a) designation and heading “Purposes” before “The purposes” in introductory provisions.Pub. L. 117–167, § 10642(b)Subsec. (a)(1). , substituted “development coordination and implementation” for “development and coordination” in introductory provisions, “acidification and coastal acidification on marine organisms” for “acidification on marine organisms” in subpar. (A), and “maintain and advise an interagency research, monitoring, and public outreach program on ocean acidification and coastal acidification;” for “establish an interagency research and monitoring program on ocean acidification;” in subpar. (B).Pub. L. 117–167, § 10642(a)(1)Subsec. (a)(2). , substituted “maintenance” for “establishment”.Pub. L. 117–167, § 10642(a)(2)Subsec. (a)(3). , inserted “and coastal acidification” after “ocean acidification”.Pub. L. 117–167, § 10642(a)(3)Subsec. (a)(4). , substituted “mitigating the impacts of ocean and coastal acidification and related co-stressors on marine ecosystems.” for “techniques for effectively conserving marine ecosystems as they cope with increased ocean acidification.”Pub. L. 117–167, § 10642(a)(4)

Short Title, , , provided that:Pub. L. 111–11, title XII, § 12401123 Stat. 1436Mar. 30, 2009“This subtitle [subtitle D (§§ 12401–12409) of title XII of , enacting this chapter] may be cited as the ‘Federal Ocean Acidification Research And Monitoring Act of 2009’ or the ‘FOARAM Act’.”Pub. L. 111–11

children.label: A
children.text: monitor and conduct research on the processes and consequences of ocean acidification and coastal acidification on marine organisms and ecosystems; and

children.label: B
children.text: maintain and advise an interagency research, monitoring, and public outreach program on ocean acidification and coastal acidification;
maintenance of an ocean acidification program within the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration;
assessment and consideration of regional and national ecosystem and socioeconomic impacts of increased ocean acidification and coastal acidification; and
research adaptation strategies and mitigating the impacts of ocean and coastal acidification and related co-stressors on marine ecosystems.
